description: Runtime-owned VM bytecode ISA schema. This first version records opcode sets, numeric opcode assignments, reusable operation classes, named instruction encodings, and per-instruction encoding references; detailed documentation and assembler grammar will be added as VMASM coverage grows.

unary.description: One operand register followed by one result register in the same register bank.

value_type.description: Register bank used for the operand and result fields.

binary.description: Two operand registers followed by one result register in the same register bank.

value_type.description: Register bank used for both operand fields and the result field.

ternary.description: Three operand registers followed by one result register in the same register bank.

value_type.description: Register bank used for all operand fields and the result field.

shift.description: One shifted operand register, one i32 shift amount register, and one result register.

value_type.description: Register bank used for the shifted operand and result fields.

select.description: One i32 condition register, two value registers, and one selected result register.

value_type.description: Register bank used for both value operands and the result field.

unary_comparison.description: One operand register followed by one i32 predicate result register.

value_type.description: Register bank used for the predicate operand field.

binary_comparison.description: Two operand registers followed by one i32 predicate result register.

value_type.description: Register bank used for both predicate operand fields.

conversion.description: One operand register followed by one result register in another register bank.

input_type.description: Register bank used for the operand field.

output_type.description: Register bank used for the result field.

global_load.description: One global byte-offset attribute followed by one loaded result register.

value_type.description: Register bank used for the value field.

global_store.description: One global byte-offset attribute followed by one stored value register.

value_type.description: Register bank used for the value field.

global_load_indirect.description: One i32 byte-offset register followed by one loaded result register.

value_type.description: Register bank used for the value field.

global_store_indirect.description: One i32 byte-offset register followed by one stored value register.

value_type.description: Register bank used for the value field.

constant.description: One immediate attribute followed by one result register.

value_type.description: Register bank used for the value field.
Register bank used for the value field.

list_get.description: One list register and one i32 index register followed by one result register.

value_type.description: Register bank used for the value field.

list_set.description: One list register, one i32 index register, and one stored value register.

value_type.description: Register bank used for the value field.

buffer_load.description: One source buffer register and one i64 byte-offset register followed by one result register.

value_type.description: Register bank used for the value field.

buffer_store.description: One target buffer register, one i64 byte-offset register, and one stored value register.

value_type.description: Register bank used for the value field.

buffer_fill.description: One target buffer register, i64 byte-offset and length registers, and one fill value register.

value_type.description: Register bank used for the value field.

switch.description: One i32 index register, one default value register, variadic value registers, and one result register.

value_type.description: Register bank used for switch values.

branch.description: One branch target followed by remapped branch operands.

conditional_branch.description: One i32 condition register followed by true and false branch targets and operands.

conditional_break.description: One i32 condition register followed by one branch target and operand list.

call.description: One function attribute followed by variadic operands and variadic results.

yieldable_call.description: One function attribute, variadic operands, a continuation target, and variadic results.

trace.description: One string attribute followed by variadic operands.

opcode_sets.description: runtime core VM bytecode opcode set
optional f32 VM bytecode opcode extension
optional f64 VM bytecode opcode extension
